Query
  Pipeline
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
          Alias hits
      By
        Ident service
    Stage eventstats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call sum
            Ident hits
          Alias total
    Stage extend
      Assign pct
        Call round
          Binary /
            Binary *
              Ident hits
              Float 100
            Ident total
          Int 1
    Stage keep
      Pattern service
      Pattern hits
      Pattern pct
    Stage sort
      SortKey -
        Ident pct
